name: EMX Royalty Corporation
description: EMX Royalty Corporation is a precious, base, and battery metals royalty company. EMX's business model is designed to provide investors with exposure to discovery, development, and production optionality. The company's diversified portfolio spans five continents and consists of royalty, royalty generation, and strategic investment assets. EMX focuses on gold, copper, and other key metals, leveraging its technical expertise to acquire and generate royalties in premier mineral districts globally.
